claims: The repository contains a bounded Boolean radius-zero constructor target shell.
The target shell depends on already exposed radius-zero atomic locality inputs for equality and relation atoms.
The Boolean constructor field is recorded as an obligation, not as a discharged recursion theorem.
nonclaims: Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
